privileged_info_summary: The Chinook database is a well-known sample database (from github.com/lerocha/chinook-database) containing real iTunes Library data for media content, with fictitious customer information and algorithmically generated sales data. The task uses a copy of this database with 412 invoices, 2240 invoice items, 59 customers, and 3503 tracks across 25 genres. Key data for this task: (1) Invoices 1-6 exist with 36 referencing invoice_items that will become orphaned; (2) Rock genre (GenreId=1) has 1297 tracks total, with 75 tracks in range 1-200 having non-null Composer values that can be identified for nullification; (3) All 59 customers have valid emails matching the pattern %@%.% (no malformed emails currently exist in the base Chinook database). The task creates an 'audit' copy at /home/ga/Documents/databases/chinook_audit.db and requires DBeaver connection named 'ChinookAudit' with output CSV at /home/ga/Documents/exports/quality_audit.csv.
